refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
refundCancellation.snippet: Can I cancel my subscription anytime? Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. If you cancel, you'll still have access to your plan until the end of your current billing period. We don't offer refunds for partial months.

refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Zebracat says monthly subscriptions can be canceled anytime and annual plans can be canceled for the following year.
refundCancellation.snippet: The pricing FAQ says monthly plans can be canceled anytime, while annual plans run for one year with cancellation available for the following year.

mainLimitations.valueCandidate: Zebracat AI is a powerful AI-driven video creation platform that helps teams create professional videos at scale, saving up to 80% of their time and budget compared to traditional video production methods.
mainLimitations.snippet: Zebracat AI is a powerful AI-driven video creation platform that helps teams create professional videos at scale, saving up to 80% of their time and budget compared to traditional video production methods.

mainLimitations.valueCandidate: We accept all major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. For enterprise customers with Unlimited Cat plans, we also support invoicing and wire transfers.
mainLimitations.snippet: We accept all major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. For enterprise customers with Unlimited Cat plans, we also support invoicing and wire transfers.

mainLimitations.valueCandidate: Our free plan allows you to create up to 5 videos with standard AI voices in 720p quality, with a maximum length of 30 seconds per video. No credit card is required to sign up for the free plan.

mainLimitations.valueCandidate: Zebracat says unused credits do not carry forward to the next billing cycle unless the user upgrades.
mainLimitations.snippet: The pricing FAQ says unused credits do not roll into the next cycle, except when upgrading to a higher plan.
